case_title: STOFF, ALAN D. vs. CHO, KATHERINE GUMSOOK DBA A-1 MARKET et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STOFF, ALAN D. AS TO DEFENDANT CHO, KATHERINE GUMSOOK DBA A-1 MARKET DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED

PHOTOCOPY FOR DEFENDANT CHO, KATHERINE GUMSOOK DBA A-1 MARKET
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,
MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF STOFF, ALAN D. COURT TRIAL SET FOR AUG-03-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF STOFF, ALAN D.

CAUSE CALLED FOR COURT TRIAL. PL. PRESENT W/DOUGLAS HOLT AS COUNSEL. DEF. PRESENT & IN PRO PER. SETTLED BY STIPULATION W/JUDGMENT FOR PL - RESTITUTION OF PREMISES AT 800 POST ST, BUT STAYED ON THE FOLLOWING TERMS: DEF. TO MAKE TOTAL PMT. OF $6,584.50 RENT & DAMAGES IN FIVE PMTS OF $1,316.90 BY CASHIERS CHECK ON 8-4-93, 8-9-93, 8-16-93, 8-23-93 & 8-30-93 IF ANY PMT IS MISSED, THE TOTAL BALANCE BECOMES DUE. IF DEF MAKES ALL THE PMTS, THE PL. WILL S/A JUDGMENT & DISMISS. PL ATTY TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHO, KATHERINE GUMSOOK DBA A-1 MARKET THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 800 POST ST, S.F, CA. $6,584.50 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,584.50, DEF. TO MAKE 5 PMTS OF $1,316.90 ON 8-4-93, 8-9-93, 8-16-93, 8-23-93 & 8-30-93. IF FULLY PD JUDGMENT WILL BE S/A & DISM. SEE FILE FOR JUDGMENT DETAILS.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
